name: Peanut Butter and Oatmeal Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, peanut butter, and sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Blend in milk and vanilla extract.
4. Thoroughly stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; add to the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in oats and chopped peanuts.
6. Drop teaspoonfuls of batter 2 inches apart onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes.
